microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized automation system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including SAP and Databricks.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across cross-functional teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard for warehouse-scale infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, ensuring scope, timeline, and change-control compliance throughout.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to apply automation to repetitive scheduling tasks, **cutting planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly reducing non-value-added operational overhead.

Managed SAP and partner integration workstreams across Walmart and NetApp, coordinating cross-functional IT and engineering stakeholders to prioritize **high-value automation programs** and align roadmaps with long-term scalability objectives.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code-generation workflows by conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across **14 key engineering teams**, eliminating 37 hours of manual effort monthly and reducing non-value-added development toil.

Influenced the automation product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and securing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation for scalable, repeatable deployments.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster, more accurate operational decision-making.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch cycle times by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating execution across 140+ teams to eliminate duplicative manual processes.

Conducted operational discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region launch**, then built a scalable automation roadmap targeting the highest-impact workflows to drive down labor costs and error-related rework.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track and visualize operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-value programs, and measure efficiency gains against defined quality metrics.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy for robotic systems, mapping hardware and software dependencies across 1,200+ automated stations to ensure safe, compliant deployment.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines** for robotic control systems, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual integration effort at each release stage.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and maintain momentum on a large-scale warehouse automation rollout.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that reduced scheduling errors and improved operational throughput across field teams.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a data-driven digital go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence to drive higher-quality inbound leads at lower cost.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and recommending process changes that aligned cost structures with operational efficiency targets.
